thread_id_note: Despite being indexed as reference_compilation, this is a question thread — OP asked where to find ECU pinout. Pinout was posted by labmixz (posts 12-14) as image (BROKEN as of 2026). Post #15 re-posts same broken image. Charlie-III at post #19 answers a tangential ECU bypass question.
title: ecu pinout
author: Raven
notes: Full thread scraped (1 page). Thread is for I4 2.0L ECU (2003 coupe) — NOT V6 G6BA. Pinout images hosted on defunct image host (broken 2026). Post #15 re-posts broken image. Post #16 (Tuscanirider) notes corrections: pin 18 duplicate, pin 10 = knock signal (not shown), pin 66 = RPM signal (not shown). Charlie-III (post #19, Aug 2024) answers ECU bypass question. Pinout for 2003 2.0L I4 only — different connector from V6.
